name: Tomato-Seafood Stew
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Whole baby clams, drained, canned
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen shrimp, thaw them first.
2. Halve the shrimp length-wise.
3. In a large saucepan, cook onion and garlic in oil until tender.
4. Stir in undrained tomatoes, tomato sauce, potato, green pepper, celery, carrot, thyme, pepper, and hot sauce. Bring mixture to boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in shrimp, clams, and parsley. Return heat to bring mixture to boil again.
7. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until shrimp turns pink.
8. Serve the stew in bowls.
